/* =========================
DTOs
========================= */ /* =========================
Parser
========================= */export class MarketplaceModuleParser{constructor(){this._data=this.createEmpty();}createEmpty(){return{defaultCategoryId:0,prefillQuery:'',canSell:false,userCredits:0,page:1,pageSize:25,totalResults:0,listings:[]};}flush(){this._data=this.createEmpty();return true;}parse(wrapper){try{// ---- Header ----
const defaultCategoryId=wrapper.readInt();const prefillQuery=wrapper.readString();const canSell=wrapper.readBoolean();const userCredits=wrapper.readInt();const page=wrapper.readInt();const pageSize=wrapper.readInt();const totalResults=wrapper.readInt();// ---- Listings ----
const count=wrapper.readInt();const listings=[];for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const listingId=wrapper.readInt();const itemId=wrapper.readInt();const baseId=wrapper.readInt();const name=wrapper.readString();const description=wrapper.readString();const price=wrapper.readInt();const quantity=wrapper.readInt();const durabilityCurrent=wrapper.readInt();const durabilityMax=wrapper.readInt();const sellerName=wrapper.readString();const sellerIsYou=wrapper.readBoolean();const secondsRemaining=wrapper.readInt();const categoryId=wrapper.readInt();const isTradable=wrapper.readBoolean();listings.push({listingId,itemId,baseId,name,description,price,quantity,durabilityCurrent,durabilityMax,sellerName,sellerIsYou,secondsRemaining,categoryId,isTradable});}this._data={defaultCategoryId,prefillQuery,canSell,userCredits,page,pageSize,totalResults,listings};// Fire event for UI
window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('marketplace_module_result',{detail:this._data}));return true;}catch(e){console.error('[MarketplaceModuleParser] Parse failed:',e);return false;}}get data(){return this._data;}}
